name: 2 Cup Glass Measuring Cup Clear - Figmint™: Borosilicate, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, 16oz Capacity
description:
Precisely measure and add ingredients when cooking or baking with the help of this 2-Cup Glass Measuring Cup from Figmint™. Made from clear, transparent glass, this measuring cup is designed with an ergonomic handle and an easy-pour spout to minimize splashing. Easy-to-read measurements in different units help you be precise when following recipes, and the cup is microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe for versatile use.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
